programme.desc: Action from the Ledro Sky Trentino, a 21km course with 1,777 metres of elevation gain that features ridge running and historic World War One trenches.

programme.title: Serie A - Full Impact
programme.desc: All the best moments from matchday 38 of the Italian top flight, featuring Bologna v Inter Milan, Torino v Juventus, Napoli v Udinese, and AC Milan v Cagliari.

programme.title: Playing for Our Future - Cycling
programme.desc: Asking what the future holds for cycling in the battle against global warming. Reshmin Chowdhury meets people at all levels to discuss how it can be a positive force for change.

programme.desc: Coverage of the second stage of the race, a 156km route from Roncade to Caorle.

programme.title: SEC Inside
programme.desc: Each week, a half-hour episode will focus on a select team and explore previously unaired footage and sounds from game preparation, the sideline and following the final whistle.

programme.title: 2026 Women's College World Series
programme.desc: From Devon Park in Oklahoma City, Okla.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: All the action from college baseball.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Across generations, people have flocked to this Atlantic Coast city to follow their dreams; farm workers from south Georgia arrived here in search of jobs as longshoremen; immigrants from Lebanon came in search of religious and economic freedom.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: A limited series on Southern food and culture. John T. Edge writes and hosts the show and is executive produced by Wright Thompson; Season Five revolves around two food stories told from one place and sets in the conversation to make larger points about Southern beliefs and identities.

programme.title: Live: College Baseball
programme.desc: All the action from college baseball.

programme.title: Live: Roland Garros 360
programme.desc: Coverage from around the courts on day eight of the Grand Slam tournament at Stade Roland Garros in Paris, featuring fourth-round matches. At this stage last year in the men's singles event, eventual runner-up Jannik Sinner beat Andrey Rublev 6-1, 6-3, 6-4 to progress, while 2025 winner Carlos Alcaraz beat Benjamin Shelton 7-6, 6-3, 4-6, 6-4. Other players to make it through to the quarter-finals

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Los Angeles Dodgers v Philadelphia Phillies (Start-time 9.10pm). Coverage of the National League match from Dodger Stadium. These two sides last met in the National League Divisional Series back in early October, a series that saw the Dodgers progress thanks to a 3-1 series victory. Los Angeles won the first two games 5-3 and 4-3 in Philadelphia, before the Phillies won game three 8-2. The hosts t

programme.desc: Amanda Serrano, one of the most decorated fighters in women's boxing history, defends her WBA and WBO featherweight world championships against German challenger Cheyenne Hanson.

programme.title: Sky Sports Catch-Up
programme.desc: Take a moment to catch-up with the all biggest sports stories hitting the headlines.

programme.title: Sky Sports Breakfast
programme.desc: Stay across the biggest sports stories this morning with a wrap-up of the headlines.

programme.title: Sunday Supplement
programme.desc: The UK's top sports journalists dissect the stories in the Sunday newspapers, offering insight, opinion and in-depth analysis. Essential viewing for fans who want more than just the score.

programme.title: Live DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The final day of the 2026 Austrian Alpine Open, a DP Word Tour event held at Golfclub Kitzbühel-Schwarzsee-Reith. Nicolai von Dellingshausen ended his wait for tour victory last season.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in elimination match 3 to advance to the Knockout Rounds. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Ninkia Green is a restaurant owner whose influence extends far beyond her delicious cuisine. She shares her inspiring journey of growth, passion, and purpose as a dedicated community leader making a lasting impact.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.desc: Jimmy Hanlin and Natalie Gulbis showcase some of the best golf destinations.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in knockout match 1 to advance to the championship. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Stephanie Lawson shares her journey of becoming a tournament angler and how the experience has transformed her outlook on life, offering new perspectives both on and off the water.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Live: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Newcastle Red Bulls v Sale Sharks (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the match from Kingston Park Stadium. The reverse fixture back in October saw the Sharks come away with a comprehensive 57-5 victory. Sale raced into a 31-0 lead at half-time thanks to five first-half tries, before another four tries in the second half saw the Sharks earn themselves an impressive victory.

programme.title: Live: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Leicester Tigers v Exeter Chiefs (Kick-off 3.30pm). Coverage of the match from Mattioli Woods Welford Road Stadium. These two sides last met back in March in the Premiership Rugby Cup final where Leicester came away with a resounding 66-14 win to lift the trophy. The Tigers were already 35-7 up at half-time thanks to five first-half tries, before they went over another five times in the second per

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: St Louis Cardinals v Chicago Cubs (Start-time 12.20am). Coverage of the National League match from Busch Stadium, as the divisional rivals go head to head. The two teams last met at this venue in August last year in a three-match series that the Cardinals won 2-1 thanks to 5-0 and 3-2 victories.

programme.desc: Alexander Zverev (GER) vs. Joao Fonseca (BRZ).

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Black Bear Island Lodge lives up to its name for a pair of seasoned bow hunters.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: The Family O'Dell scores with three Texas giant whitetails.

programme.title: Archery
programme.desc: The Archery Shooters Association's (ASA) the biggest event of the season culminates with the Pro Pressure Point Shootdown at the Laurel County Fairgrounds in London, KY, 2026.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: The land of haggis, bagpipes and kilts also has some of the best stag hunting around; Jim is in Scotland.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy joins the folks at Bevan's Oyster Company for a detailed look at how they raise and harvest some of the highest quality oysters in the world.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: During the herring spawn, Mike continues the long tradition of passing down generational knowledge to Heather, ensuring she can share this knowledge with her community now and in the future.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Chef Leysath and friends use bows to shoot flying Asian carp in Illinois; they also head to Indiana where it's legal to shoot frogs with 22s and pellet rifles; neither of them tastes like chicken.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: The land of haggis, bagpipes and kilts also has some of the best stag hunting around; Jim is in Scotland.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Ryan Callaghan hunt for wild hogs and feral sheep with Danny Bolton.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Ryan Callaghan meet with Kimi Werner and Danny Bolton on the Big Island to dive in the deep blue for mahi mahi and wahoo.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Ways to make a whitetail hunting more interactive by using decoys, mock scrapes, ropes, and more.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: On a quest to film giant whitetail bucks in Saskatchewan.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: A waterfowl patrol, a busy summer lake party and an opportunity for 4th-graders to visit a state park for a field trip.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: The largest growing market for handguns today is concealed carry; now legal and allowed in all 50 states, over half require no special permit; join host Joe Mantegna as he takes a closer look at some of the most popular choices in conceal carry.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Who will win this round?

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: AHO Host, David Morse, joins the HHA USA crew and takes a tour through Mathews HQ and shoots one of the most epic archery courses in Wisconsin!

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: It's what the In-Fisherman staff does best, on a constant quest to discover fine fisheries and topnotch fishing tactics, at they offer a simple system that works across North America for largemouth bass.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Two Conchs Crew makes an 1800-mile round trip to The Bahamas, starting in San Salvador and targeting monster wahoo.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: La'Tonya Blanding shares her inspiring journey into the world of fishing, reflecting on the experiences that shaped her love for the sport. She opens up about the people and moments that sparked her passion, revealing how fishing has become both a source of joy and a powerful outlet for personal growth and connection.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: This week, Bill's speckled trout fishin' on the Indian River near Palm Bay, Florida!

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy joins the folks at Bevan's Oyster Company for a detailed look at how they raise and harvest some of the highest quality oysters in the world.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Fishing captains search the coastal waters of southeastern U.S.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Anchor Wally Marshall fishes for crappie in east Texas, Texas.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: It's what the In-Fisherman staff does best, on a constant quest to discover fine fisheries and topnotch fishing tactics, at they offer a simple system that works across North America for largemouth bass.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action-packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straightforward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platf

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland and Mike Johnson find a morning school of quality bass on Lake 1, catching them on jigs in deeper water, then move to a second lake in the afternoon to land 3-5 lb. bass on jigs and frogs in the reeds.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Host and producer Mark Romanack shares his 30-plus years of professional fishing savvy with viewers.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Ways to make a whitetail hunting more interactive by using decoys, mock scrapes, ropes, and more.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Join the Slock Master for an action-packed voyage into the past where primitive hunting is relived by the world's most recognized authority in spear and blowgun hunting. Laugh or cry, Tim Wells delivers every time.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: The land of haggis, bagpipes and kilts also has some of the best stag hunting around; Jim is in Scotland.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Chef Leysath and friends use bows to shoot flying Asian carp in Illinois; they also head to Indiana where it's legal to shoot frogs with 22s and pellet rifles; neither of them tastes like chicken.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Capt. Don and his Grandson Tyler talk about memories and mishaps while landing Kingfish and Amberjacks out of Jacksonville, Fla.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: AHO Host, David Morse, joins the HHA USA crew and takes a tour through Mathews HQ and shoots one of the most epic archery courses in Wisconsin!

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Combines the lives and dreams of Sparky, a retired professional firefighter and president of M2D Camo.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Jeremy Atkins and Kenneth Lancaster express their views on hunting.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: On the final installment of the Alaska adventure DUTV Co-Host Colin Mulligan and the DUTV crew get one of the rarest experiences in the current water fowling world. To hold a beautiful mature Emperor Goose in our hands.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: The Family O'Dell scores with three Texas giant whitetails.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week Blaine Anthony is up in Canada looking for a big bruin black bear.

programme.title: Roger Raglin On Target
programme.desc: Roger extends his hunt in Mexico to hunt a specific buck he has targeted.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The HW crew returns to Kansas for their annual Thanksgiving hunt; a cold front brings big snow goose success-and tough conditions.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: Michael Waddell explains what makes Wyoming a great state to take a buck.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Baltimore Orioles host the Toronto Blue Jays in Game 2 of a four-game regular MLB series. Right-handed pitcher Brandon Young starts against right-handed Dylan Cease. Home run leader Gunnar Henderson powers the Orioles in the competitive AL East.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Highlights
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Blue Jays and Orioles conclude a high-stakes American League East divisional series. Ernie Clement hits a stellar .294 for Toronto, while Adley Rutschman provides 26 RBIs for Baltimore as both teams look to move up in the League's East standings.

programme.desc: The Blue Jays and Orioles continue their American League East series at Camden Yards. Trey Yesavage gets the ball for the visiting Blue Jays while the Orioles counter with left-handed Trevor Rogers. The home team seeks an edge in this matchup.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Amazin' Finishes
programme.desc: A year-by-year look at the team's most exciting comebacks, big hits, clutch performances and walk-off homers - all on full display for Mets fans to relive.

programme.desc: From Citi Field in Flushing, N.Y.

programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.desc: From Citi Field in Flushing, N.Y.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Mets Yearbook
programme.desc: Highlights of the New York Mets season.

programme.title: Canyon of Heroes
programme.desc: An original SNY documentary that looks into the unique history of New York City's ticker-tape parades as they celebrated along Broadway, focusing on the major championship celebrations in 1994 and 1986.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: A look back at the obscure, oddball, and twisted stories in New York Sports from 1988.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Obscure, oddball, and twisted stories in New York sports from 1991.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: A look back at 1995, when head coach Pat Riley sent his resignation letter via fax and left the New York Knicks for the Miami Heat.

programme.title: Broadway Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing action featuring up-and-coming fighters and promising contenders.

programme.title: BigWater Adventures
programme.desc: Yellowfin Tuna are the bread and butter of the MGFC. Add to that some ground fishing and a few surprises, and this is a show you don't want to miss.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Two Conchs Crew makes an 1800-mile round trip to The Bahamas, starting in San Salvador and targeting monster wahoo.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob spends the morning with his good friend Pete. The duo have a banner day fishing the backcountry.

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: One of Jared's favorite places to fish in the world is Panama, so it's no surprise that he makes sure to head there at least once a year; being dodged by the toothy Cubera Snapper for the last couple of years, Jared is here for redemption.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: 2025 Summit Cup Elimination Round 2.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Following rumors of giant bass, Chris Lane aims for untouched waters on his hunt to find giant Florida bass.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Bassmaster Classic Champion Ott DeFoe hunts down big Smallmouth in the clear, shallow, rocky rivers of Minnesota.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: ZAFS friend Casey Ehlert joins Z for a day of topwater explosion goodness.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: 2-time Champion Randall Tharp squares off against Fletcher Shryock on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: Deep sea fishing, sea fly-fishing and fishing charters.

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: The Barotse floodplains have a reputation for Tigers that exceed the legendary 20-pound mark. Tommo and Rhu fly into this angling haven hoping to hook into the 'Barotse Express' and in the process discover an equally impressive fish that few have...

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: The tropical waters of Mozambique are home to many strange, beautiful, and sometimes, scary fish species.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: The crystal waters of the Arabian Sea near the small desert town of Salalah in Oman offer up their secrets. Who would have guessed that the beautiful clean fighting Queen Fish would be found in such abundance only meters from the shore line.

programme.title: Wildfly Best of
programme.desc: We embark on an exciting quest to target the prolific yellowfish of Sterkfontein Dam using dry fly techniques. Experience the thrill of sight fishing for these stunning species in crystal-clear waters, surrounded by breathtaking scenery.

programme.desc: All the action from college baseball.

programme.title: Live: Boxing
programme.desc: Stephanie Han (12-0, 3 KOs) defends her WBA lightweight title against the former world champion Holly Holm (34-3-3, 9 KOs) in this main event rematch. From El Paso County Coliseum in El Paso, Texas.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979.
